_comment: Catalog entry to add to SchemaStore's api/json/catalog.json (append to the alphabetically-sorted `schemas` array). After this merges, editors with the JSON Schema Store / YAML extension (VS Code, JetBrains, etc.) auto-apply this schema to any *.persona.yaml / *.persona.json file — autocomplete + inline validation with zero per-repo config. Submission steps: docs/SCHEMASTORE.md.
